subject: Welcome to Udemy!
text: Congratulations! You have successfully registered on Udemy. Start your learning journey today.

subject: Course enrollment confirmed

subject: Sign up failed

subject: Sign in successful
text: You have successfully signed into your Heroku account. If this wasn't you, reset your password immediately.

subject: Deployment successful

subject: Deployment failed

subject: Build failed on Railway

subject: Your deployment is live!

subject: Scholarship payment rejected

subject: Service termination notice

subject: Account suspended

subject: Build #47 succeeded

subject: Build #49 failed again

subject: YOU ARE A LUCKY WINNER!!!

subject: I think we need to talk
text: I have been thinking about this for a long time. I do not think this relationship is working for me anymore. I am sorry.

subject: Re: us
text: I just want you to know that losing you is the worst thing that has happened to me this year. I hope you reconsider.
